creator: antoine.brodin@laposte.net
text:

> 
> Maintainer of devel/libgii,
>

> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/140967

I can't reproduce the problem and there is no patch.

Cheers,

Antoine
